title: Blazing
body:
Optimization + some nice quality of life client-side mods.

### 🎮 Gameplay:
- ItemSwapper
- Simple Voice Chat
- Voxel Map Updated
- Item Scroller

### ⚡ Optimization:
- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- Dynamic FPS
- ImmediatelyFast
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- More Culling
- Better Block Entities
- Borderless Fullscreen

### ⭐ Quality of Life:
- Dark Loading Screen
- Horse Statistics
- MidnightControls
- No Chat Reports
- Zoomify
- LambDynamicLights
- ItemSwapper
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Smooth Scrolling
- Iris

### ⚙️ Technical
- Carpet
- Tweakeroo
- Litematica
- MiniHUD

### 📘 Libraries:
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- MaLiLib
- Fabric API
- Config Manager
- Text Placeholder API
- Mod Menu
